ayahEnglish: Those who deny the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know,

targetTranslation: our messengers (object of كَذَّبُوا - they denied)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْكِتٰبِ وَبِمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا بِهِۦ رُسُلَنَا فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those who deny the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know,

targetTranslation: they know (referring to those who denied)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْكِتٰبِ وَبِمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا بِهِۦ رُسُلَنَا فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those who deny the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know,

ayahArabic: إِذِ ٱلْأَغْلٰلُ فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ وَٱلسَّلٰسِلُ يُسْحَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged

targetTranslation: their necks (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the surah)
ayahArabic: إِذِ ٱلْأَغْلٰلُ فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ وَٱلسَّلٰسِلُ يُسْحَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged

ayahArabic: إِذِ ٱلْأَغْلٰلُ فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ وَٱلسَّلٰسِلُ يُسْحَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged

targetTranslation: they are being burned/heated (in النَّارِ - the Fire)
ayahArabic: فِى ٱلْحَمِيمِ ثُمَّ فِى ٱلنَّارِ يُسْجَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled [with flame].

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

targetTranslation: where (asking about false deities in تُشْرِكُونَ)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

targetTranslation: you (all) were (asking about what you used to worship)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تُشْرِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then it will be said to them, "Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]

ayahArabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا بَل لَّمْ نَكُن نَّدْعُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ شَيْـًٔا كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Other than Allāh?" They will say, "They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything." Thus does Allāh put astray the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا بَل لَّمْ نَكُن نَّدْعُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ شَيْـًٔا كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ

targetTranslation: that is for you all (addressing multiple people)
ayahArabic: ذٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.

targetTranslation: you (all) rejoice (because of what you used to do)
ayahArabic: ذٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.

targetTranslation: you all were (referring to those who rejoiced wrongfully)
ayahArabic: ذٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.

targetTranslation: you all are being excessively joyful (because of your wrongful joy on earth)
ayahArabic: ذٰلِكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَبِمَا كُنتُمْ تَمْرَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The angels will say], "That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

targetTranslation: ones lasting forever (describes those entering the gates)
ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

targetTranslation: dwelling place (of الْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ - the arrogant ones)
ayahArabic: ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى نَعِدُهُمْ أَوْ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So be patient, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى نَعِدُهُمْ أَوْ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ

targetTranslation: we will surely take your soul (cause you to die)
ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى نَعِدُهُمْ أَوْ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So be patient, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى نَعِدُهُمْ أَوْ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: So be patient, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِّن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُم مَّن قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُم مَّن لَّمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَن يَأْتِىَ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ قُضِىَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allāh. So when the command of Allāh comes, it will be concluded [i.e., judged] in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all].

ayahEnglish: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allāh. So when the command of Allāh comes, it will be concluded [i.e., judged] in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all].

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِّن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُم مَّن قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُم مَّن لَّمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ وَمَا كَانَ لِرَسُولٍ أَن يَأْتِىَ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ قُضِىَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلْمُبْطِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allāh. So when the command of Allāh comes, it will be concluded [i.e., judged] in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all].

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَنْعٰمَ لِتَرْكَبُوا۟ مِنْهَا وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.

targetTranslation: The One who (connects to جَعَلَ - made/placed)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَنْعٰمَ لِتَرْكَبُوا۟ مِنْهَا وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.

targetTranslation: he made (for لَكُمُ - for you all)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَنْعٰمَ لِتَرْكَبُوا۟ مِنْهَا وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَنْعٰمَ لِتَرْكَبُوا۟ مِنْهَا وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَلِتَبْلُغُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فِى صُدُورِكُمْ وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَلِتَبْلُغُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فِى صُدُورِكُمْ وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَلِتَبْلُغُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فِى صُدُورِكُمْ وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.

ayahArabic: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَلِتَبْلُغُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فِى صُدُورِكُمْ وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.

ayahArabic: وَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَأَىَّ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allāh do you deny?

ayahArabic: وَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَأَىَّ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allāh do you deny?

ayahArabic: وَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَأَىَّ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allāh do you deny?

targetTranslation: you all deny (referring to multiple people being addressed)
ayahArabic: وَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِهِۦ فَأَىَّ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ تُنكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allāh do you deny?

targetTranslation: And did they not (before يَسِيرُوا۟ - travel)
ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ كَانُوٓا۟ أَكْثَرَ مِنْهُمْ وَأَشَدَّ قُوَّةً وَءَاثَارًا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ كَانُوٓا۟ أَكْثَرَ مِنْهُمْ وَأَشَدَّ قُوَّةً وَءَاثَارًا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ فَرِحُوا۟ بِمَا عِندَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ فَرِحُوا۟ بِمَا عِندَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when they saw Our punishment, they said, "We believe in Allāh alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him."

targetTranslation: our might (object of رَأَوْا - they saw)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when they saw Our punishment, they said, "We believe in Allāh alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him."

targetTranslation: they said (subject of ءَامَنَّا - they believed)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشْرِكِينَ

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشْرِكِينَ

targetTranslation: those who make partners (with Allah) (object of كُنَّا - we were)
ayahArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥ وَكَفَرْنَا بِمَا كُنَّا بِهِۦ مُشْرِكِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when they saw Our punishment, they said, "We believe in Allāh alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him."

ayahArabic: فَلَمْ يَكُ يَنفَعُهُمْ إِيمٰنُهُمْ لَمَّا رَأَوْا۟ بَأْسَنَا سُنَّتَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِى قَدْ خَلَتْ فِى عِبَادِهِۦ وَخَسِرَ هُنَالِكَ ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. [It is] the established way of Allāh which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost [all].

targetTranslation: he benefits them (subject of لَمْ يَكُ)
